description: Style NoteThis sneaker is a part of Fusion sneakers line from skechers, equipped with comfy features and a stylish upper. Style this with your off-duty staples to give them a new-season twist.Product DetailsBlack round toed leather and synthetic upper with nubuck overlaysHas central lace-ups and branding on the upper, midsole, tongue and outsoleHas a padded inner and tongueFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with terraced grooves and circular nubsMaterial and CareLeather, syntheticClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
